author: y4rr
content: Phase 1A landed: ferrotorch-paged crate scaffold + ActivationProfiler with 11 passing tests. block.rs (BlockId/BlockKind/WeightBlockIndex), metrics.rs (MagnitudeStats), profiler.rs (ActivationProfiler over HookedModule). Per-head attention tap and sparsity aggregator remain open — attn tap needs a MultiheadAttention intermediate capture since HookedModule only sees module-level input/output.
